name: DevX Guild
description: The premier developers and designers group on campus. We build open source projects, host hackathons, and run UI/UX workshops for student builders.

name: Creative Circle
description: A hub for visual artists, designers, writers, and musicians. We collaborate on art exhibitions, zines, and creative direction projects.

name: Athletics Club
description: Bringing sports enthusiasts together. We organize inter-faculty sports tournaments, fitness bootcamps, and outdoor running groups.
